sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18169" key="a)fauro/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφαυρ-ότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n18169.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">feebleness,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῶν αἰσθήσεων</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxag.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
